projects.name:
RoleSync AI – ATS Resume Optimizer & Cover Letter
Generator
projects.description:
• Architected AI-powered resume optimization platform scoring
against JDs using dual-metrics (ATS + Domain Fit), achieving
user-reported interview callback improvement. 85%+
• Engineered real-time keyword injection with DOM-scanning AI and
TipTap editor, enabling one-click insertion of metric-driven bullet
points with visual pulse animations.
• Implemented dynamic PDF export pipeline bridging LaTeX
and TipTap to TexLive backend, delivering ATS-optimized resumes
without external database persistence.
• Built zero-upload cover letter generator with Zustand state
featuring ultra-strict prompt engineering for sub-300-word tech-
nical recruiter-persona outputs and Clipboard API fallback. 3-tier

projects.name: Semantic Image Search – Multimodal Retrieval Engine
projects.description:
• Engineered multimodal search pipeline using OpenAI CLIP for
generation and Pinecone for vector indexing, achieving <100ms
retrieval latency across image dataset. 50,000+
• Implemented text-to-image, image-to-image, and hybrid search
workflows, enabling nuanced discovery of semantically relevant visual
content.

projects.name: GhostShell – AI-Powered Terminal Assistant
projects.description:
• Fine-tuned DeepSeek-Coder-V2 model using on LoRA 15K+
pairs, improving command prediction accuracy by 27%
over baseline.
• Built CLI autocompletion system leveraging user history and
variables to provide intelligent command suggestions.

projects.name: SmartDietPlanner – AI-Powered Nutrition Assistant
projects.description:

recipe retrieval, serving queries with response time. <2s
